message:
fix(core): move plan_concurrent_commit under commit_write_mutex to prevent MVCC commit index corruption

plan_concurrent_commit() reads next_commit_seq to assign a sequence
number, but previously this happened outside the commit_write_mutex.
A concurrent connection could advance next_commit_seq between plan
and finalize, causing assigned_commit_seq != committed_seq and
corrupting the MVCC commit index.

Key changes:
- Move plan_concurrent_commit() call inside the commit_write_mutex
  critical section so planning and finalizing share the same lock hold
- On plan failure (SSI conflict etc.), abort the concurrent session
  under the mutex to maintain sequencing invariants before returning
- Fix RefCell double-borrow bug in ALTER TABLE RENAME: split
  remove+insert on rowid_alias_columns, autoincrement_tables, and
  sqlite_sequence_cache into separate statements so the RefCell borrow
  is dropped before re-borrowing for insert
- Update test_alter_table_rename_succeeds to verify data survives
  rename (previously only checked rename didn't panic due to the
  RefCell bug)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
